task_completion.description: Locate the Sales Order 'SO-2026-Alpha' for Alpha Industries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the Sales Order list or details view with 'SO-2026-Alpha' and 'Alpha Industries' visible.

task_completion.description: Initiate the conversion of the Sales Order to an Invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the Invoice creation or edit form pre-filled with data from the Sales Order (e.g., Alpha Industries as the organization).
The 'Subject' text field in the Invoice form contains exactly 'INV-2026-Alpha'.
The 'Status' dropdown or field in the Invoice form is set to 'Created'.

task_completion.description: Apply a Shipping & Handling charge of 50.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Shipping & Handling' field in the item details or totals section of the form is set to 50.00.

task_completion.description: Save the Invoice record and verify the final total.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message or the saved Invoice detail view showing the subject 'INV-2026-Alpha', status 'Created', shipping charge 50.00, and a Grand Total of 2350.00.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the CRM via the web browser GUI, not via direct database or terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the CRM interface to perform the task.

integrity.description: The agent actually typed or selected the values in the form fields rather than just editing HTML.
integrity.visual_evidence: Form fields are actively being filled out in the browser, with dropdowns being clicked or text being typed.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal or script to bypass the UI steps.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or code editors are open showing scripts that directly manipulate the database or API to create the invoice.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Invoice Subject is 'INV-2026-Alpha'. The expected Status is 'Created'. The expected Shipping & Handling charge is 50.00. The original Sales Order is 'SO-2026-Alpha' for 'Alpha Industries'. The final expected Grand Total for the invoice is 2350.00 (which is the sum of the seeded line items totaling 2300.00 plus the 50.00 shipping charge).
